## Why

What problem does it solve? Link any related issue (`Closes #...`).

## How

Key implementation notes / trade-offs.

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] Respects the architectural invariants (no raw transcripts, embedder behind the interface, LLM off the critical path, Postgres as the single source of truth)
- [ ] Updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` where relevant
